Title: Twent - AI Agent for Android
Description: Personal agentic OS for Android that automates apps, runs Ubuntu terminal, and connects to 1000+ services. Free download, no credit card.
URL: https://twent.xyz

# Quick Facts

- **Product**: Twent — AI agentic OS for Android
- **Type**: Consumer mobile app / AI agent platform
- **Price**: Free (everything included)
- **Download**: Direct APK from https://twent.xyz (no Play Store)
- **Requirements**: Android 8.0+, 3GB RAM, 500MB storage, arm64-v8a

# Core Offering

Twent is a personal AI agent that runs entirely on your Android device. It combines:
- AI chat overlay on any app
- Full Ubuntu 24.04 terminal
- Local AI model execution
- System automation (tap, swipe, type on any app)
- 1000+ integrations via MCP and Composio

# Key Features

## AI Agent
- Floating chat bubble overlay on any app
- Screen reading and UI automation
- Voice wake word activation
- Persistent memory across sessions
- Claude Code and OpenAI Codex integration

## Ubuntu Terminal
- Ubuntu 24.04 LTS on Android (no root)
- Bash, zsh, fish shells
- apt, npm, pip, cargo package managers
- Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, C/C++
- Git, SSH, VS Code Server

## Privacy & Local AI
- GGUF models run locally on device
- BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) — API keys encrypted locally
- Zero telemetry, zero data collection
- MNN (Mobile Neural Networks) for inference
- Works fully offline

## Integrations
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers
- Composio (1000+ app connections)
- Skills marketplace (buy/sell AI behaviors)
- Reusable workflow automation

## Automation
- Visual workflow builder
- Tasker integration
- Scheduled triggers
- No root required

# Pricing

Free. All features. No credit card.
- Ubuntu terminal: included
- AI tools: included
- MCP plugins: included
- Local models: included
- No subscription, no ads in free tier (future ads will be non-intrusive AI ads)

# Company

- Website: https://twent.xyz
- Support: support@twent.xyz
- Distribution: Direct APK download
- Platform: Android 8.0+ (API 26)
